debug_info.goal:
case right
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
c : C
⊢ ⨆ p, ↑p c = ⊤

proof:
· have h := I.pointwise_iSup_eq_top c
    simp only [iSup_subtype] at h ⊢
    exact h
failed_attempts:
· have h := I.pointwise_iSup_eq_top c
    simp only [iSup_subtype'] at h ⊢
    convert h using 1
    ext x
    simp only [Submodule.mem_iSup, SetLike.mem_coe]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨p, hp, hx⟩
      exact ⟨p, hp, hx⟩
    · rintro ⟨p, hp, hx⟩
      exact ⟨p, hp, hx⟩

· have h := I.sSup_eq_top
    have : (⨆ p : I, (p : PersistenceSubmodule M) c) = ⊤ := by
      rw [← iSup_subtype'']
      have : sSup (SetLike.coe I) c = ⊤ := by rw [h]; rfl
      convert this
      simp only [sSup_apply, iSup_subtype'']
    exact this

· have h := I.sSup_eq_top
    simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_eq, Submodule.subtype_apply] at h
    have : (⨆ p ∈ I, p) c = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) c := congrFun (congrArg DFunLike.coe h) c
    simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
    convert this using 1
    exact iSup_subtype'
